name: Oven Bacon
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the sliced bacon on a rack in a roasting pan.
2. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for 15-20 minutes, or until crispy.
3. Remove from the oven and let cool.
4. Cover tightly and refrigerate for 2-48 hours to firm up.
5. To reheat, bake at 450°F (230°C) for 5 minutes, or until crisp again.
6. Serve hot.
